prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KEYBOARD-HK-8030A-RED Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Kids Electric Keyboard Piano Organ Play Toy with Lights Sounds Music Recording, Red Description: Do you have a budding musical prodigy under your roof? If so, the KidPlay Kids Electric Keyboard Piano Organ Play Toy with lots of interactive musical buttons, flashing lights, a variety of fun playback sounds, musical recording and playback capabilities and more, your little pop star or classical pianist will be ready to take center stage in no time, performing their favorite songs and creations for friends and family. More specifically, the piano keyboard features 24 musical keys, eight (8) musical instrument buttons, animal noise buttons, flashing lights, record and replay/demo buttons, four (4) rhythms to choose from, tempo control buttons and an easy to use on/off switch; the kids piano learning play toy also includes volume control buttons which we know, parents out there will love.

The musical star electric organ keyboard for kids is an amazing educational tool that goes beyond just music. The piano keyboard introduces your little one to shapes, sounds, colors and will help in the development of your little ones hearing, hand-eye coordination, music cognition, as well as their fine motor skills and they work on pressing each of the 24 individual keys and other buttons. Gift this to any little music lover in your life for some guaranteed, screen-free fun; a great toy to get kids and toddlers off or away from cell or mobile phones, laptops, computers, tables and more.

The kids piano pretend play toy also comes with a convenient, built-in ergonomic carry handle that makes the piano keyboard for kids easy to travel with, making it a great toy to take pack for family trips and vacations, play dates, sleepovers and more, as it's just one, lightweight piece. The kids electric piano is notably, battery-operated so, no worrying about charging or plugging in. Batteries are included with purchase so the fun can start right out of the box.

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts)

AGE: 3+ Search Terms: Toys for girls music electric piano fine motor skills birthday present active kids toys preschool learning activities sister Hanukkah Christmas gifts stocking stuffers playroom musical instruments recorder instrument for kids songs parenting pretend Features: - GREAT INTRO TO MUSIC & LEARNING: Do you have a budding musical prodigy under your roof? If so, the KidPlay Kids Electric Keyboard Piano Organ Play Toy with lots of interactive musical buttons, flashing lights, a variety of fun playback sounds, rhythm and music, tempo and musical recording and replay ability and more, your little pop star or classical pianist will be ready to take center stage in no time, performing their favorite songs and creations for friends and family - EDUCATIONAL DEVELOPMENT: The musical star electric organ keyboard for kids is an amazing educational tool that goes beyond just music! The piano keyboard introduces your little one to shapes, sounds, colors and will help in the development of your little ones hearing, hand-eye coordination, music cognition, as well as their fine motor skills and they work on pressing each of the 24 individual keys and other buttons! - KEYBOARD FEATURES: The piano keyboard features 24 musical keys, eight (8) musical instrument buttons, animal noise buttons, flashing lights, record and replay/demo buttons, four (4) rhythms to choose from, tempo control buttons and an easy to use on/off switch; the kids piano learning play toy also includes volume control buttons which we know, parents out there will love! - CONVENIENT TRAVEL HANDLE: Featuring a convenient, built-in ergonomic carry handle that makes the piano keyboard for kids easy to travel with, it's a great toy to take pack for family trips and vacations, play dates, sleepovers and more, as it's just one, lightweight piece; the kids electric piano is battery-operated so, no worrying about charging or plugging in - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14 (L) inches; Color: Red; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
